sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29008" key="dusetumolo/ghtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δῠσ-ετῠμολόγητος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n29008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hard to derive</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὄνομα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0654.tlg002:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Corn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">ND</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">20</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
